_comment: Vertex AI Vector Search index configuration for SplitCircle expense memory (RAG-01/02/07). 768 dims to match text-embedding-005. Streaming updates so newly added expenses are searchable immediately. Security is enforced via per-datapoint `restricts` namespaces (user, group) — a query MUST pass the authenticated uid as an allow filter (Critical Rule #2).
description: Per-user/per-group namespaced expense embeddings for RAG.

datapointSchema._comment: Shape of each upserted datapoint. The id is COMPOSITE — expenses live embedded in the group doc, so the groupId is required to hydrate them back from Firestore (see parseDatapointId in services/rag/rag_service.ts).
